program_name: The Ultimate Push Pull Legs System
author: Jeff Nippard
extraction_notes: Warm-up ranges like "3-4" were collapsed to the lower bound for the integer warmup_sets field. The original PDF shorthand is preserved in each exercise set_code.
Rows that OCR returned as "N/A" but clearly represented a static hold or stretch were renamed from the corresponding cue or substitution text so the program remains importable.
A few lower-body coaching cues in the PDF appear to describe a substitution option more directly than the primary lift; they were preserved as written.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press (No Leg Drive)
exercises.coaching_cue: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Zero leg drive.

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Deficit Push Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace with your non-working arm, squeeze your pecs by pressing the cable across your body.

exercises.name: Pec Static Stretch 30s
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold a pec stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Think about swinging the cable out and up as if drawing a sword from your side.

exercises.name: DB Skull Crusher (12-15 reps)
exercises.coaching_cue: Do the second half of the ROM for pressdowns (the squeeze) and the first half of the ROM for overhead extensions (the stretch).
exercises.substitution_2: Squeeze-Only Triceps Pressdown + Stretch-Only Overhead Triceps Extension

exercises.name: Single-Arm Cable Tricep Kickback
exercises.coaching_cue: Extend your triceps with your arm more out to the side than a regular pressdown. Feel the stretch as the cable moves across your torso.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Do 4 feeder sets of 10 reps by gradually building the weight up from set to set. Set 1 is pretty light (RPE 4-5). Set 2 is a little heavier (RPE 6-7). Set 3 is a little heavier again (RPE 7-8). Set 4 is your hard set: try to hit failure at 10 reps on this last set.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: After hitting failure at about 10 reps, do a dropset. Strip the weight back about 30-50% and do another 5 reps with nice and controlled technique.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Use 3 different grips for the 3 working sets (ideally going from wider to closer).

exercises.name: 1-Arm Lat Pull-In
exercises.coaching_cue: Do DB lat pullovers, but cut out the top half of the ROM (stay entirely in the stretched aspect of the lift).

exercises.name: Lat Static Stretch 30s
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold a lat stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Reverse DB Flye
exercises.coaching_cue: 1st set: low-to-high. 2nd set: mid-range. 3rd set: high-to-low.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on contracting your biceps, minimize torso momentum.

exercises.name: Bottom-Half Bayesian Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Do preacher curls, but cut out the top half of the ROM (stay entirely in the stretched aspect of the lift).

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar.

exercises.name: Pause DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Drop the weight by about 25% from your top set. 2 second pause. Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar.

exercises.name: 45° Hyperextension
exercises.coaching_cue: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg.

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce.

exercises.name: Machine Crunch
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard.

exercises.name: Machine Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: 1.5x shoulder width grip, pull your chest to the bar.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Machine Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Use about a 45° incline and a grip width just outside shoulder width.

exercises.name: Meadows Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Kroc rows are basically just a dumbbell row with mild cheating and a slightly more upright posture. Don't be afraid to go heavy and use straps if your grip is limiting.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: First 5 reps: 5-second lowering phase. Last 15 reps: constant tension (no pausing at the bottom or top).
exercises.substitution_2: Eccentric-Accentuated Cable Lateral Raise, Constant-Tension Cable Lateral Raise

exercises.name: DB Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Curl across your body with your arm out to the side at about 60°.

exercises.name: Kneeling Modified Push Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Place your hands close together on the ground so that they form a diamond shape and do as many pushups as possible with a smooth tempo.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting.

exercises.name: DB RDL
exercises.coaching_cue: Think about doing a high-hip conventional deadlift with a slight bend in the knees.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.coaching_cue: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Control the weight with a 3-4 second negative.

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.coaching_cue: Don't swing your legs at the bottom, minimize momentum, tuck your knees towards your chest if lifting your legs straight out is too challenging.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep.

exercises.name: Incline Machine Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Set the bench at a 45-60° incline, touch the bar to your upper chest with control.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Lean away from the cable. Focus on squeezing your delts.

exercises.name: DB French Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Do both arms at once, resist the negative.

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.coaching_cue: Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension).

exercises.name: Machine Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Pull your elbows down against your sides.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Initiate the movement by squeezing your shoulder blades together, pull to your lower chest, avoid using momentum.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Reverse DB Flye
exercises.coaching_cue: Swing the weight out, not back.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Arc the bar out not up, focus on squeezing your biceps.

exercises.name: DB Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: You can use slight momentum on the concentric, but control the eccentric with your elbows stationary.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar.

exercises.name: 45° Hyperextension
exercises.coaching_cue: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move.

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce.

exercises.name: Machine Crunch
exercises.coaching_cue: Round your back as you crunch.

exercises.name: Machine Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Use about 1.5x shoulder width grip. Add weight or use assistance as needed to hit RPE. Keep form as consistent as possible.

exercises.name: Standing DB Arnold Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Bring the dumbbells all the way down, keep your torso upright.

exercises.name: Incline Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together, drive your elbows down and back.

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your lateral delt to move the weight.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Alternate arms with each curl: do 1 rep with your right arm, one rep with your left arm. Repeat until you reach 4-6 reps with each arm.

exercises.name: DB Triceps Kickback
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Allow your knees to come forward (past your toes), focus the tension on your quads.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Do 4-6 reps with each leg (8-12 total strides). Straps may be helpful if your grip becomes limiting.

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight.

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce.

exercises.name: Machine Crunch
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold a plate or DB to your chest and crunch hard!

exercises.name: Low Incline Smith Machine Press
exercises.coaching_cue: 15° bench angle, tuck your elbows on the negative, flare as you press.

exercises.name: Standing DB Arnold Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Don't stop in between reps, keep smooth and controlled tension on the delts.

exercises.name: Pec Deck
exercises.coaching_cue: Do one set with low cable position, one set with medium-height cable position, and one set with a high cable position.

exercises.name: Constant-Tension Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Lean into a bench and do lateral raises. Keep tension - don't rest your arm against your side at the bottom.
exercises.substitution_2: A1: Lean-In Constant Tension DB Lateral Raise

exercises.name: Side Delt Static Stretch (30s)
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold a side delt stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: DB French Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Do both arms at once, resist the negative.

exercises.name: Kneeling Modified Push Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Place your hands on a medicine ball and do smooth, controlled pushups.

exercises.name: Cable Lat Pullover
exercises.coaching_cue: Keep chest tall, keep elbow tucked in close to your torso, focus on squeezing your lat to move the weight.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: One set wide grip (overhand), 1 set middle grip (overhand), 1 set close grip (underhand).

exercises.name: Incline Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together on each rep.

exercises.name: Plate Shrug
exercises.coaching_cue: Set up two cable handles low and shrug up and in. Squeeze your upper traps to move the weight.

exercises.name: Bent-Over Reverse DB Flye
exercises.coaching_cue: Swing the weight out, not back.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Arc the bar out not up, focus on squeezing your biceps.

exercises.name: Cable Curl 21's
exercises.coaching_cue: 7 reps seated, 7 reps standing full ROM, 7 reps bottom-half curls.

exercises.name: Bicep Static Stretch (30s)
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold a bicep stretch for 30 seconds. The stretch should be held at about a 7/10 intensity.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: These will be challenging, let's push. Don't go so heavy that you miss reps. Be humble with your weight and focus on keeping your torso upright.

exercises.name: 45° Hyperextension
exercises.coaching_cue: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Take medium strides, minimize the amount you push off your rear leg.

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Lift with a slow tempo. The positive should take 3 seconds and the negative should take 3 seconds.
exercises.substitution_2: SLOW Seated Leg Curl (3 up, 3 down)

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.coaching_cue: Contract your glutes and position your elbows under your eyes to make the plank more difficult.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on the chest and explode up on each rep.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Use about 60% of the weight you used on your top set and do it for as many reps as possible. You should be in the range of 10-20+ reps on this set. Use a spotter and safety bars.

exercises.name: Machine Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: 6 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 6x. Keep form smooth and controlled.

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip T-Bar Row
exercises.coaching_cue: 10 cluster sets: 3 reps, rest 15s, repeat 10x. Keep form tight.

exercises.name: DB Triceps Kickback
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight.

exercises.name: DB Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Keep your elbow behind your torso throughout the range of motion, focus on squeezing your bicep. Sets are per arm.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.coaching_cue: Medium width feet placement on the platform, don't allow your lower back to round.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your quads to make the weight move.

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to make the weight move.

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.coaching_cue: Clear your upper back off the floor when you crunch, hold for 1-2 seconds and then go back down. Don't yank with your neck.
